page = <Page url='https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/leave/viewLeaveList'>

    def test_leave_page(self,page):
        login = LoginPage(page)
        # dashboard = DashboardPage(page)
        leave = LeavePage(page)
    
        login.load()
        login.login("Admin", "admin123")
        leave.verify_leave_click()
        leave.verify_assign_leave()
    
        leave.verify_assign_leave_details()
        leave.verify_leave_success_message()

self = <orange_hrm.pages.leave.LeavePage object at 0x000001A79A8CF770>

    def verify_leave_record_present(self):
        # already on leave module, go to Leave List
        self.page.get_by_role("link", name="Leave List").click()
    
        # confirm leave list page loaded
        expect(self.page).to_have_url(re.compile("viewLeaveList"))
    
        # click Search to load records
        search_btn = self.page.get_by_role("button", name="Search")
        expect(search_btn).to_be_visible()
        search_btn.click(no_wait_after=True)
    
        self.page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
    
        # verify at least one row is present
        rows = self.page.locator(".oxd-table-card")
